summary: Iteration 4 - Bug fix verification COMPLETED. Both bugs fixed: 1) ReservationSuccess now uses React Router state (useLocation) instead of sessionStorage. 2) Créneau buttons now display BOTH start and end times (e.g., '09:00 - 10:00'). All features working correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages and flows working, bugs fixed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs verified fixed. Créneau display shows 'HH:MM - HH:MM' format. ReservationSuccess uses useLocation() state. All 14 prestations displayed. 19 time slots per date. Stripe CardElement loads after filling client form. Admin login works.

bug_1_reservation_success_page.description: ReservationSuccess now uses useLocation() state instead of sessionStorage
bug_1_reservation_success_page.verification: CardPaymentForm.js navigates with state: navigate('/reservation-success', { state: { reservation } }). ReservationSuccess.js reads: const { state } = useLocation(); const reservation = state?.reservation;

bug_2_creneau_display_format.description: Créneau buttons now display both start AND end times
bug_2_creneau_display_format.verification: Playwright test confirmed créneaux show '09:00 - 10:00', '09:30 - 10:30', '10:00 - 11:00' format. API returns heure_debut and heure_fin. UI displays both.

homepage.details: Hero image visible, page loads without errors

reservation_step2.details: 12 dates shown (48h+ in future), 19 time slots per date, créneaux show START - END format

reservation_step3.details: Client form (nom, email, telephone), Stripe CardElement visible after filling form, payment info shows 30% acompte

admin_login.details: Login with admin@glowshape.fr/admin123 returns JWT token

api_prestations.details: Returns 14 prestations with all required fields

api_disponibilites.details: Returns 19 time slots with heure_debut AND heure_fin fields

security_headers.details: x-content-type-options: nosniff, x-frame-options: SAMEORIGIN, referrer-policy: no-referrer present
